'''Modo So''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who managed the [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] circuit owned by [[Lupo Shar]] in [[3951 BBY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the the player character chooses to help the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Borna Lys]] in buying the swoop circuit from Lupo Shar, Modo will still manage the circuit.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
